title: Travel and Tourism
transcript: Welcome to the travel information center. Our guided tours depart daily from the main entrance at 9 a.m. The tour includes visits to the historic museum, the botanical gardens, and the famous lighthouse.

questions.question: The tour includes visits to the museum, gardens, and the _____

title: Library Services
transcript: Hello and welcome to the city library. Our opening hours are from 9 a.m. to 6 p.m., Monday to Saturday. We offer a wide range of services including book borrowing, internet access, and study rooms.

questions.question: Opening hours are from _____ to 6 p.m.
The library is open Monday to _____

title: Hotel Reservation
transcript: Good morning, this is Riverside Hotel. How may I help you? We have several room types available: single rooms for $100 per night, double rooms for $150, and suites for $250. Breakfast is included.

questions.question: Which meal is included in the room price?
